tooltip.ruinaarcana.giz_arcano.line1: Shift + right click cycles the sigil mode.
tooltip.ruinaarcana.giz_arcano.line2: Use on a block to draw a sigil on the ground.
tooltip.ruinaarcana.catalisador_magico.l: Pulls charge from the sky and refills nearby arcane items.
Hold it to distribute energy around you.
tooltip.ruinaarcana.runa_da_ruina.line1: A temporal focus that distorts life and motion.
tooltip.ruinaarcana.runa_da_ruina.line2: Accelerates local time and pulls creatures inward.
tooltip.ruinaarcana.runa_da_colheita.lin: Reduces bench crop harvesting energy cost.
tooltip.ruinaarcana.runa_da_vitalidade.l: Reduces bench energy cost for animal handling.
tooltip.ruinaarcana.runa_do_fluxo.line1: Amplifies energy flow through the arcane grid.
tooltip.ruinaarcana.runa_do_fluxo.line2: Increases energy pulled from batteries each pulse.
message.ruinaarcana.altar_ritual.hint: Rituals: Core (condensation), Rune of Ruin + reagent (forging), or two runes (fusion). Each ritual requires its sigil style.
message.ruinaarcana.altar_ritual.pattern: The sigil pattern around the altar is incomplete.
message.ruinaarcana.altar_ritual.sky_req: The altar must see the sky to draw power.
message.ruinaarcana.altar_ritual.created: The Ritual Altar condensed a Magic Catalyst.
message.ruinaarcana.altar_ritual.rune_mi: Hold the reagent in offhand: wheat, golden carrot, redstone, or chest.
message.ruinaarcana.altar_ritual.created: Runic fusion complete: Slime Ball x4.
Runic fusion complete: Ender Pearl x2.
Runic fusion complete: Nether Star x1.
message.ruinaarcana.codex_runico.created: A Runic Codex guide book has been created.
message.ruinaarcana.rune_enabled: The Rune of Ruin awakens its temporal field.
message.ruinaarcana.rune_disabled: The Rune of Ruin has been sealed.
message.ruinaarcana.rune_faded: The Rune of Ruin lost its force.
message.ruinaarcana.rune_not_enough_char: Not enough charge. You need at least %s.
tooltip.ruinaarcana.vinculo_astral.line1: First click the bench, then the destination chest.
tooltip.ruinaarcana.vinculo_astral.line2: Teleporting items consumes arcane charge per item.
tooltip.ruinaarcana.vinculo_astral.ready: Origin stored. Choose the chest next.
message.ruinaarcana.vinculo_astral.sourc: Astral Link: bench saved as origin.
message.ruinaarcana.vinculo_astral.no_so: Mark an Arcane Harvest Bench first.
message.ruinaarcana.vinculo_astral.inval: The target needs an inventory, such as a chest.
message.ruinaarcana.vinculo_astral.sourc: The marked bench was not found.
message.ruinaarcana.vinculo_astral.link_: Astral Link completed. Items will teleport now.
message.ruinaarcana.grimorio_arcano.cast: No stable space to blink into.
message.ruinaarcana.bancada_colheita_arc: The Rune of Ruin has been installed.
The Rune of Ruin has been removed.
Arcane Bench: %s / %s charge | %s used slots | rune: %s | link: %s
tooltip.ruinaarcana.bancada_colheita_arc: Install the Rune of Ruin to automate farms.
Harvests crops, collects surplus meat, and stores everything.
Use the Astral Link to send the contents into a chest.
tooltip.ruinaarcana.grimorio_arcano.line: Right click casts the selected spell.
tooltip.ruinaarcana.codex_runico.line1: Right click to generate this codex advanced book.
tooltip.ruinaarcana.codex_runico.line2: Pre-written editions (with diagrams) are in the creative tab.
message.ruinaarcana.altar_ritual.pattern: Condensation pattern incomplete: Celestial (N/S), Growth (E/W), Gravitational (diagonals).
Forging pattern incomplete: Celestial (N/S), Transmutation (E/W), Growth (diagonals).
Fusion pattern incomplete: Essence (N/S), Gravitational (E/W), Transmutation (diagonals).
